subject: Re : (no subject)
body:
Dear Jeffrey,
It seems you have not received the mails I sent to you before, I just went into my "sent" and I didn't find them.
Anyway, I was telling you that I am going full speed with the Main House, I am working in Venice this weekend and in New York just before Thanks G. to wrap up the last presentation. I think it is fabulous. The Library as you know is all ready for the CZM but everyone has decided to proceed after we have the one for the Pool Compound in order not to create problems.
I have been in contact with Doug, in regards to all this projects. 
Fancelli will have AS SCHEDULED for the first week of December a mock up of the Library, with out the torsed columns, as of today there are pieces in different ateliers, remember the size, is inmense! All I have now to see is still the corp of your office Library, with the study of the lighting, and I think all the columns are allready sculptured. I do not want to interrupt my schedule, either I finish with the Main House project presentation or I go back to the millwork shops and try to prepare something for next week, but I cannot do both. Could you schedule your visit to Paris arround the 10th? 
By the way, the Interallie in Paris commisioned me to do the Spa! funny,no? It will happen in 2009.



-----E-mail d'origine-----
De : J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
A : Jpm6929@aol.com
Envoyé le : Ve 16 Novembre 2007 18:01
Sujet : (no subject)



I need to know if I come to Paris on Monday,, what I can see at Francelli

Anyway, I was telling you that I am going full speed with the Main House, I am working in Venice this weekend and in New York just before Thanks G. to wrap up the last presentation.
